scripts.py:install: .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu torch && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.cpu.txt
scripts.py:install:cpu: .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu torch && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.cpu.txt
scripts.py:install:gpu: .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.gpu.txt
